name: Kaltura Video Platform API
what_it_does: Kaltura REST API for enterprise and education video platform. Enables AI agents to manage video assets, retrieve analytics, control access and permissions, trigger transcoding, and integrate video workflows. Kaltura is widely deployed in higher education (LMS integration) and enterprise for internal communications and training.
use_cases: Managing video library and asset metadata from content management agents
Retrieving video analytics and engagement data from educational analytics agents
Triggering video transcoding and processing from media workflow agents
Integrating video content into LMS and e-learning platform agents
not_for: Consumer video hosting at scale (Kaltura is enterprise/edu focused)
Simple video hosting without enterprise management needs
Real-time video conferencing (use Zoom/Teams for meetings)
best_when: An enterprise or educational institution using Kaltura wants AI agents to manage video libraries, analyze engagement, and integrate media workflows into LMS or internal portals.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Educational video data in higher education contexts falls under FERPA. Student video access and analytics data requires careful handling.

auth.notes: Kaltura session-based authentication (KS - Kaltura Session). API key + partner ID + secret to generate KS tokens. Tokens are short-lived. Kaltura SDKs handle session management.

pricing.paid_tiers: SaaS pricing negotiated; on-premise licenses available
pricing.notes: Open-source community edition and enterprise SaaS. Kaltura is commonly deployed by universities and enterprises.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per partner and plan; not publicly documented for SaaS

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Educational video data subject to FERPA; student data requires special handling
No public MCP server — SDK or REST API integration required
Kaltura Session (KS) token auth is complex — use official SDK for session management
Kaltura API uses custom parameter format (not standard REST) — learn the service/action pattern
On-premise and SaaS API endpoints differ — verify deployment type
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Educational video content under FERPA. Student analytics data requires institutional controls. SOC2, GDPR, FERPA. Session token auth.

security_score_components.security_notes: Educational and enterprise video data under FERPA and GDPR. Session token auth. Institutional data governance required.
